name: AWS
description: Amazon's industry-leading cloud platform with 200+ services including EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, and a 12-month free tier.

name: Cloudflare Pages
description: Free, fast static site and JAMstack hosting with unlimited bandwidth. Global CDN, zero-config deployments from Git, and serverless functions included.

name: DigitalOcean
description: Developer-friendly cloud platform. Deploy Droplets, managed databases, Kubernetes clusters, and app platforms easily.

name: Fly.io
description: Deploy full-stack apps and databases globally close to users. Runs Docker containers on hardware VMs worldwide. Generous free tier and per-second billing.

name: GitHub Pages
description: Free static site hosting straight from a GitHub repo. Perfect for portfolios, docs, and project sites. Supports custom domains and HTTPS out of the box.

name: Hetzner
description: German cloud provider with some of Europe's best VPS prices. Dedicated servers, cloud instances, and object storage.

name: Hostinger
description: Affordable shared and VPS hosting with hPanel control panel, one-click WordPress, and fast NVMe servers.

name: Linode
description: Akamai's cloud platform with affordable Linux VPS, Kubernetes, object storage, and managed databases.

name: Microsoft Azure
description: Microsoft's enterprise cloud platform. Virtual machines, AI services, DevOps pipelines, and deep Microsoft 365 integration.

name: Namecheap
description: Affordable domain registration and shared hosting. Includes free WhoisGuard privacy and one-click WordPress installs.

name: Oracle Cloud
description: Enterprise cloud platform with a generous always-free tier including 2 AMD VMs, object storage, and a managed database.

name: Porkbun
description: Budget-friendly domain registrar with free WHOIS privacy, SSL certificates, and competitive renewal rates.

name: Railway
description: Modern cloud deployment with minimal config. Deploy apps, databases, and cron jobs directly from a GitHub repo.

name: Render
description: Simple cloud hosting for web services, static sites, APIs, and background workers with automatic Git deployments.

name: Supabase Storage
description: S3-compatible object storage built into Supabase. Store, serve, and transform images and files at scale. Built-in CDN and row-level security policies.

name: Vultr
description: High-performance cloud compute, bare metal, and object storage starting at $2.50/mo. 32 global data centre locations.

name: Render
description: Modern cloud hosting for web apps, APIs, and static sites with free tiers. Simple Git-based deploys, no DevOps needed.

name: Railway
description: Deploy apps, databases, and cron jobs in seconds. Developer-friendly infrastructure with usage-based pricing.
